title: Authors and Citation
text: Wright D (2021). gwaspr: GWAS plots R. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/gwaspr.
code: @Manual{,   title = {gwaspr: GWAS plots with R},   author = {Derek Wright},   year = {2021},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://derekmichaelwright.github.io/gwaspr}, }

title: GWAS plots with R
text: gwaspr: R package plotting GWAS results GAPIT package GAPIT: R package performing Genome Wide Association Studies (GWAS) https://github.com/jiabowang/GAPIT3

title: GWAS plots with R
text: tidyverse, ggpubr, ggbeeswarm, ggrepel, ggtext, plotly, htmlwidgets

title: GWAS plots with R
code: myTraits <- list_Traits(folder = "Results/") myResults <- list_Result_Files(folder = "Results/") mp <- gg_GWAS_Summary(folder = "Results/", traits = myTraits) ggsave("GWAS_Summary.png", mp, width = 12, height = 6) for(i in myTraits) {   mp <- gg_Manhattan(folder = "Results/", trait = myTraits[i], facet = F)   ggsave(paste0("Multi_",i,".png"), mp, width = 12, height = 6) } for(i in myTraits) {   mp <- gg_Manhattan(folder = "Results/", trait = myTraits[i], facet = T)   ggsave(paste0("Facet_",i,".png"), mp, width = 12, height = 12) }

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations.

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
code: gg_GWAS_Summary(   folder,   traits,   threshold,   threshold2 = NULL,   models = c("GLM", "MLM", "CMLM", "MLMM", "SUPER", "FarmCPU", "Blink"),   colors = c("darkgreen", "darkred", "darkorange3", "steelblue", "darkorchid4",     "darkgoldenrod2"),   markers = NULL,   hlines = NULL,   title = NULL,   caption = paste0("Threshold = ", threshold, "\nSuggestive = ", threshold2),   rowread = 2000 )

title: gg_GWAS_Summary — gg_GWAS_Summary
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. traits traits read. threshold Significant threshold. threshold2 Suggestive threshold. models Models read. colors Colors model. markers Markers labelled vertical red line. hlines Locations horizontal lines. e.g., hlines = c(1.5,2.5). title title plot. caption caption plot. rowread Number rows read GWAS results file.

title: gg_GWAS_Summary_plotly — gg_GWAS_Summary_plotly
text: Creates summary GWAS plot significant associations.

title: gg_GWAS_Summary_plotly — gg_GWAS_Summary_plotly
text: mp Plot gg_GWAS_Summary. filename Filename plot. width Plot width. height Plot height.

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
code: gg_Manhattan(   folder,   trait,   title = trait,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   lines = F,   facet = T,   qq = T,   pmax = NULL,   models = c("GLM", "MLM", "CMLM", "MLMM", "SUPER", "FarmCPU", "Blink"),   colors1 = c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3",     "darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen"),   colors2 = c("darkgreen", "darkred", "darkorange3", "steelblue", "darkorchid4",     "darkgoldenrod2") )

title: gg_Manhattan — gg_Manhattan
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. lines Logical, value whether include vertical lines markers. facet Logical, whether produce facetted multi-model plot. qq Logical, whether add QQ plot pmax max value y-axis. models Models read. colors1 Colors chromosome. colors2 Colors model.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: Creates manhattan plot zoomed particular region.

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
code: gg_Manhattan_Zoom(   folder,   trait,   chr,   start,   end,   title = trait,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   lines = F,   models = c("GLM", "MLM", "CMLM", "MLMM", "SUPER", "FarmCPU", "Blink"),   colors = c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen",     "darkgoldenrod3", "darkgreen") )

title: gg_Manhattan_Zoom — gg_Manhattan_Zoom
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. chr Chromosome plot. start Start position chromosome. end End position chromosome. title title plot. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. lines Logical value whether include vertical lines markers. models Models read. colors Colors chromosome

title: gg_Marker — gg_Marker
text: Creates marker plot myG myY objects.

title: gg_Marker — gg_Marker
code: gg_Marker(   myG,   myY,   trait,   marker,   marker2 = NULL,   type = "bar",   points = T,   colors = c("darkgreen", "darkgoldenrod3", "darkred", "steelblue4", "darkslategray",     "maroon4", "purple4", "darkblue") )

title: gg_Marker — gg_Marker
text: myG GWAS genotype object. Note: myY GWAS phenotype object. trait Trait plot. marker Marker plot. marker2 Second marker plot. type Type plot make. points Logical, whether plot points colors Color palette.

title: gg_Volcano — gg_Volcano
code: gg_Volcano(   folder,   trait,   title = trait,   markers = NULL,   labels = markers,   models = c("GLM", "MLM", "MLMM", "CMLM", "SUPER", "FarmCPU", "Blink") )

title: gg_Volcano — gg_Volcano
text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. trait trait read. title title plot. markers Markers labelled. labels Labels used markers. models Models read.

title: list_Top_Markers — list_Top_Markers
text: x data. chroms Chromosomes include. n Number per chromosome. threshold_filter Logical, filters non-significant results.

text: folder Folder containing GWAS results. file file read. threshold Significant threshold. threshold2 Suggestive threshold. rowread Number rows read.

title: theme_gwaspr. — theme_gwaspr
code: theme_gwaspr(   x,   bgFill = "grey95",   lineColor = "white",   linesize = 0.75,   stripFill = "white",   ... )

title: theme_gwaspr. — theme_gwaspr
text: x ggplot bgFill background fill color lineColor color axis lines linesize border line size stripFill strip background color
